evals.prompt: We just had a production outage — our payment service was down for 45 minutes because a database migration locked a table. 200 users couldn't complete checkouts. Help me write the post-mortem.
evals.expected_output: Should produce a blameless incident post-mortem with timeline, root cause analysis (5 Whys), and prevention action items.
assertions: Uses blameless language throughout (systems, not people)
Reconstructs a timeline with key events
Applies 5 Whys to get past 'migration locked table' to systemic cause
Identifies root cause as missing migration safety process, not the specific migration
Action items include prevention, detection, AND process improvements
Each action item has a specific owner and deadline
Includes 'what went well' section (not just what went wrong)
Quantifies impact (200 users, 45 minutes, potential revenue loss)

evals.prompt: Run a sprint retrospective for our team. This sprint we completed 8 of 10 planned stories, had one carry-over from last sprint, and our CI pipeline was broken for 2 days due to a flaky test. Team morale seems a bit low.
evals.expected_output: Should facilitate a structured retro using Start/Stop/Continue or similar format, address the specific issues (carry-over, CI, morale), and produce 2-3 actionable items.
assertions: Uses a structured format (Start/Stop/Continue, 4Ls, or similar)
Addresses the CI breakage specifically (not just generically)
Each action item has an owner
Includes review of previous retro action items
